description:
idx_of: HashMap<FnId, usize> is rebuilt from scratch inside walk_spec_for_discovery (line 800), compute_effective_returns (line 2410), opaque_consumer_arities (line 374), and type_module_pass itself (line 465). Each rebuild is O(n_fns) and these functions are called inside fixpoint loops.

Build idx_of once at the top of type_module_pass and thread it as &HashMap<FnId, usize> into:
  - walk_spec_for_discovery (new parameter)
  - compute_effective_returns (new parameter)
  - opaque_consumer_arities (new parameter)

The local idx_of construction inside each function is removed. type_module_pass holds the single canonical copy for the duration of one pass.
title: hoist idx_of into type_module_pass; remove 4 per-call rebuilds
